topic: 53 基于国六标准的重型柴油车远程排放监控系统研发

evidence_gaps: Need ≥2 baseline methods implementing OBD/CAN-bus remote emission telematics, not just emitter-screening paper.

Need at least one dataset (China VI OBD raw CAN frames or open-access fleet emissions).
